explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 53 from a base nutrition score of 50. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: excellent tuber-category fit
topPros.explanation: Strong vitamin support and gentler carb behaviour make it one of the cleanest tuber-category foods.

topCons.title: naturally sweeter than some tubers
topCons.explanation: Still fine, but it is not the lowest-sugar energy food in the category.

topCons.title: healthiness depends on preparation
topCons.explanation: Heavy added fats or sugary toppings can change the practical outcome.

topCons.title: protein contribution is light
topCons.explanation: Like most tubers, it is not doing much in the protein lane.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 41 from a base nutrition score of 38. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: very practical staple food
topPros.explanation: Cheap, common, and easy to build meals around, which matters for a tuber category built on energy foods.

topCons.title: glycemic behaviour is only middling
topCons.explanation: Not as clean as the best tubers on the carb-behaviour axis.

topCons.title: micronutrient return is fine rather than elite
topCons.explanation: Strong enough to be respectable, not enough to be exceptional.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in D tier with an overall score of 25 from a base nutrition score of 34. Context dragged it down by 9 points.

topPros.title: strong comfort-food appeal
topPros.explanation: A very real reason people like them, even if the nutrition fit is weak.

topPros.title: still retains some tuber identity
topPros.explanation: Not nutritionally empty, just much worse than stronger tuber forms.

topPros.title: satisfying texture and taste
topPros.explanation: Part of the real-world appeal, especially for content framing.

topCons.title: fried format is a major category negative
topCons.explanation: This drags tubers away from the cleaner energy-food role the category is supposed to reward.

topCons.title: glycemic behaviour is rough
topCons.explanation: A major practical strike against the food in a carb-behaviour category.

topCons.title: energy density is much harsher than ideal
topCons.explanation: Much easier to overshoot calories than with cleaner tuber forms.

narrationNotes: Context weakened the final tier case by 9 points.
